import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; export const DriverLogin: React.FC = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'login' | 'register'>('login'); const [registerStep, setRegisterStep] = useState<1 | 2 | 3>(1); const handleLoginSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => { e.preventDefault(); navigate('/driver'); }; const handeRegisterSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => { e.preventDefault(); if (registerStep === 1) { setRegisterStep(2); } else if (registerStep === 2) { setRegisterStep(3); // Pending Verification Step } }; return (
